### Thank You for Signing up
We'll keep you informed of the latest Intel Foundry updates and industry perspectives.
# AI Inspired. Systems Accelerated
Intel Foundry is deploying a new, world-first approach to full-stack solution support for accelerated time to market, delivering a systems foundry for the AI era and leading the industry transition from “system on chip” to “system of chips.”   
  
We offer world-class process nodes, industry-leading packaging and test technologies, and a rich portfolio of semiconductor and systems IP. We deliver through more sustainable manufacturing and a global, resilient, secure supply chain.
[ ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/systems-foundry.html)
##  The First Systems Foundry Designed for the AI Era 
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/systems-foundry.html)
## Process Technologies
Take advantage of world-class process innovation. We’re delivering advancements beyond traditional node scaling, with a comprehensive IP portfolio and trusted ecosystem partners. 
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/process.html)
## Advanced Packaging & Test
Combine front-end and back-end technologies to create solutions optimized at the system level with our leadership in 2D, 2.5D, and 3D packaging. Utilize our full suite of testing services, from wafer sort to final test, with specialized solutions like singulated die test and industry-leading test equipment capacity.
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/packaging.html)
## Manufacturing 
Leverage a robust, geo-diverse, secure, and expanding supply for wafers and assembly & test. Our leadership in sustainability helps our customers meet their targets and regulatory requirements.
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/manufacturing.html)
## Intel Foundry Accelerator Ecosystem Alliances
Enjoy comprehensive support in key areas from ecosystem partners across IP, EDA, Design Services, Cloud, USMAG, Value Chain, and Chiplet Alliances.
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/accelerator.html)
## Software and Services
Accelerate system delivery with design support integrating our unique technologies, unified compute software development across multiple architectures and vendors, and decades of experience delivering solutions in partnership with industry leaders.
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/software.html)
## Industry-Leading Research
Research drives our long-term competitiveness and differentiation. Discover the future unfolding now at Intel Foundry.
[Learn more](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/research.html)
## Explore Our Latest Whitepapers & More
[See resources](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/foundry/library/overview.html)
#  Let's Build the Future Together 
Contact Intel Foundry today
